data_contracts_notes: Mentions 'team id' and 'team alias' but no schema details, field names, types, or API contract changes are documented
dependency_context_notes: References 'Usage page' and 'export report' but no file paths, function names, or module boundaries provided. Screenshots shown but not descriptive.
behavioral_specificity_notes: States what was wrong (user ID used instead of team ID, alias not resolved) but no specifics on resolution logic, edge cases, or conditions
outcome_clarity_notes: Clear that team ID and team alias should be fixed in export report, but exact behavior when alias doesn't exist is ambiguous ('if it exist'). Two developers could interpret alias fallback behavior differently.
acceptance_criteria_notes: Tests were added (checkbox checked) but no specific test cases, assertions, or expected outputs are described in the spec itself. Would need to review test files to verify.
scope_boundaries_notes: Well-scoped: explicitly limited to export report on Usage page, only 2 fixes. However, no mention of whether this affects other reports or pages.
error_states_notes: Minimal error handling described. No mention of: what happens if team ID is null/missing, what if alias resolution fails, what if export format is corrupted, timeout scenarios.
summary_issues: Screenshots included but not annotated with before/after clarity
No explicit data structure changes documented (what fields changed in export output)
No file paths or code references provided
Team alias resolution logic not specified (fallback behavior, priority)
No edge case coverage: missing team, missing alias, null values
